description_long: This is a classic-style motorcycle with a black body, featuring a prominent fuel tank, a single seat, and chrome accents on the exhaust and wheels. The motorcycle has spoked wheels, a round headlamp, and a rear license plate, giving it a vintage yet robust appearance. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, with visible rearview mirrors and hand grips. The engine is exposed, showing detailed mechanical components, and the rear includes a taillight and indicators. The side profile reveals the brand 'Royal Enfield' on the fuel tank, suggesting a retro design influence. The overall build is sturdy, with metallic and rubber materials dominating the structure.
description: A black, vintage-style Royal Enfield motorcycle with chrome accents, spoked wheels, and a single seat. It features a round headlamp, wide handlebars, and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the license plate, taillight, indicators, and the back of the seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chrome exhaust, spoked wheels, and 'Royal Enfield' branding on the fuel tank.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the round headlamp, wide handlebars, and front wheel alignment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, kickstand, and the overall profile of the motorcycle.
